notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted RPM Italian menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menu explicitly mentions toasted almond, almond biscotti, pistachio gelato with Sicilian pistachios, and Marzadro Pistachio.
The pasted menu also includes a direct allergy notice asking guests to alert the server about food allergies or dietary restrictions.
